ddls:
CREATE TABLE "world_series" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each World Series game */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year the game took place */,
  "round" TEXT /* Round of the World Series game */,
  "team_id_winner" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "league_id_winner" TEXT /* League affiliation of the winning team */,
  "team_id_loser" INTEGER /* ID of the losing team */,
  "league_id_loser" TEXT /* League affiliation of the losing team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the winning team in the series */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the losing team in the series */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties in the series */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the umpire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_world_series_league_id_winner FOREIGN KEY ("league_id_winner") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_world_series_team_id_loser FOREIGN KEY ("team_id_loser") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_world_series_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_world_series_umpire_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire_id") REFERENCES umpires ("umpire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_world_series_league_id_loser FOREIGN KEY ("league_id_loser") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_world_series_team_id_winner FOREIGN KEY ("team_id_winner") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" TEXT /* The year in which World Series games took place */,
  "season_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "season_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" TEXT /* League affiliation of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "dissolved_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was dissolved (null if still active) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "umpires" (
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each umpire */,
  "umpire_name" TEXT /* Name of the umpire */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the umpire was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("umpire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player played for */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach led */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the coach was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the stadium is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the stadium is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the data */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the version was updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_data_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data version */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (read-only, read-write, none) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "version_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each World Series game

City where the team is based
State where the team is based
Year the league was dissolved (null if still active)
ID of the team the player played for
ID of the team the coach led

Description of the changes made in the version
